bio.intro: I'm Luiz Felipe, a Software Engineer from Santa Catarina, Brazil. Currently at Mercado Livre. Experienced with Java, Spring, React, Microservices and Cloud.

cards.ev_description: Cost tracking and electric car analysis with breakdown by category and trends.
cards.amortizacao_description: Loan simulator with SAC/Price, extra amortization plans, monetary correction and insurance.
cards.sun_map_description: Interactive 3D map • Real-time shadows • Solar calculation by location. Visualize solar azimuth and altitude for any location and time with 3D buildings and vector shadow projection.
